title: ACTREC Recruitment 2026 - Walk-in-Interview for 20 Nurse Posts
description: The Advanced Centre for Treatment, Research and Education in Cancer (ACTREC) has declared the official notification for the recruitment of 20 Nurse Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified in the B.Sc Nursing can grab this chance and apply for the ACTREC Recruitment 2026 . Here, we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested candidates can attend the walk-in at the address below. If you are look...
